creator: sunpoet@FreeBSD.org
text:
py-setuptools 61.0.0 is out just now. Update the patch to v3.

(In reply to Po-Chuan Hsieh from comment #7)

Forgot to mention that devel/py-trollius should be marked DEPRECATED for 2 reasons:
- It is deprecated by upstream.
- The asyncio package has been included in the standard library since Python 3.4.
